rule_text: The masthead gradient device (Sunshine → light gold, with the logo mark placed at the lightest end; asset ast_lisraya_masthead_gradient_device) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
intent: Standardize the approved masthead copy-holding device.
summary: Masthead copy must use the masthead gradient device (Sunshine to light gold gradient, logo mark at lightest end, asset ast_lisraya_masthead_gradient_device).
